templates.body:
LADDER RUNG DEFINITIONS
Support engineer: scope _______________  evidence to enter _______________
Escalation engineer: scope _______________  evidence to enter _______________
Does not include (still product eng): _______________
Promotion cadence: _______________

TEACH-PATH SCRIPT
Customer asked for: _______________
What they actually need: _______________

Say: We hear you want depth. Here is how we solve this class of issue and who owns it.
Show: steps / owner / when true escalation eng engages
Do not: raw no or fake promise of product eng

LADDER COMMS (internal + customer-safe)
Internal: why these titles exist _______________
Customer-safe: what next level means _______________
Sales talking points: _______________
Date published: _______

RETURN LEARNING
Escalation theme: _______________
KB/training item: _______________
Owner on line support: _______________  Due: _______
Success: esc volume for theme drops

PROMO EVIDENCE ROW
Person: _______________  Target rung: _______________
Cases / skills shown: _______________
Gaps: _______________
Decision: Y/N  Date: _______
